DISCOVERY 612, NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO COMPEL DEFENDANT DAVID KNAPP'S FURTHER RESPONSES AND PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS AND THINGS IS MOOT AS SUPPLEMENTAL RESPONSES HAVE BEEN SERVED. THE COURT WILL NOT DETERMINE THE ADEQUACY OF THOSE RESPONSES ON THIS MOTION. COUNSEL ARE ORDERED TO MEET AND CONFER. COUNSEL ARE ADVISED THAT WHILE OBJECTIONS HAVE NOT BEEN WAIVED, THE PRELIMINARY STATEMENTS MADE WITH THE RESPONSES WOULD NOT BE APPROVED. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE INITIAL OBJECTIONS WERE A MISUSE OF THE DISCOVERY PROCESS. SANCTIONS ARE IMPOSED AGAINST DEFENDANTS IN THE AMOUNT OF $786.30, TO BE PAID WITHIN 30 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
